channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Britain's Free Speech at Risk: Now a De Facto Blasphemy Ban Looms
Police ID Pawtucket Ice Rink Shooter as Transgender Father of Three Who Went by 'Roberta'
Tom Emmer blasts Democrats' double standard on SAVE Act: 'They require photo IDs' at their own DNC
item.description: House GOP Whip Tom Emmer blasts Democrats over photo ID rules at the DNC, arguing their stance undercuts their opposition to the SAVE Act and exposes ...

item.title: Hot Takes: It's No Contest, Between a Pro-Palestine Activist and Americans' Love for Their Dogs
'Clown': Gavin Newsom Files Hurt Feelings Report on Ted Cruz, Commits Embarrassing Self-Own Instead
Swalwell's 'I should be working' gym, pool videos resurface as Dem rival hammers his missed House votes
item.description: Rep. Eric Swalwell's pool and gym videos are resurfacing in California's governor race as his opponent's campaign hammers him for missing votes on Cap...

item.title: Rev Jesse Jackson, civil rights leader and Rainbow PUSH founder, dies at 84
item.description: The Rev Jesse Jackson, a prominent civil rights activist and two-time Democratic presidential candidate, died Tuesday morning at age 84, according to ...

item.title: Trump says 'this is a Democrat shutdown' as he touts low inflation, falling murder rate
item.description: President Donald Trump blamed Democrats for the partial government shutdown while claiming economic wins including lower gas prices and inflation.

item.title: Thune guarantees voter ID bill to hit the Senate despite Schumer, Dem opposition: 'We will have a vote'
item.description: SAVE America Act faces Senate filibuster hurdle despite 50 GOP backers as Republicans weigh talking filibuster option to advance voter ID requirements...

item.title: Watch: Schumer Gets Tripped Up Over Voter ID Question As Fetterman Remains Lone 'D' Voice of Reason
